center.name: 匹兰斯堡狩猎保护区
center.summary: 匹兰斯堡狩猎保护区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Brubru、Neddicky、White-winged widowbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: solivagus at Pilanesberg, South Africa | image2 = Brubru (Nilaus afer) (022A-WA03044X0030-0002M0).ogg | image2_caption = Song recorded in Kiboko, Kenya | genus = Nilaus | parent_authority = Swainson, 1827 | species = afer | authority = (Latham, 1801) | synonyms = *Nilaus capensis }} The brubru (Nilaus afer) is a species of bushshrike (family Malaconotidae) found in most of Sub-Saharan Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: dexter at Pilanesberg, South Africa | image2 = Piping Cisticola (Cisticola fulvicapilla) (W1CDR0000367 BD18).ogg | image2_caption = Song recorded in Cape Province, South Africa | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | taxon = Cisticola fulvicapilla | authority = (Vieillot, 1817) | synonyms = Cisticola fulvicapillus }} The neddicky, or piping cisticola (Cisticola fulvicapilla), is a small passerine bird in the family Cisticolidae, which is native to Africa, southwards of the equator

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-winged widowbird (Euplectes albonotatus) is a species of passerine bird in the family Ploceidae native to Africa south of the Sahara. It is highly sexually dimorphic in its breeding season, during which the male's yellow plumage turns dark and he gains more white feathers, contrasting with the female's predominantly pale coloration
